challenged_findings.challenge: Check if R000079 has special_approval or if cumulative before this record was already over budget
challenged_findings.result: Confirmed: cumulative before R000079 was 230,281.68 < 230,395.17 (budget). R000079 adds 226.98 making 230,508.66 > budget. special_approval=0.
Confirmed: cumulative before was 107,412.40 < 107,785.42. R002009 adds 746.04 making 108,158.44 > budget. special_approval=0.
Confirmed: cumulative before was 109,665.23 < 109,772.07. R003968 adds 213.68 making 109,878.91 > budget. special_approval=0.
Confirmed: cumulative before was 264,827.18 < 264,890.39. R000894 adds 126.41 making 264,953.59 > budget. special_approval=0.
Confirmed: cumulative before was 278,326.33 < 278,540.94. R003479 adds 429.21 making 278,755.54 > budget. special_approval=0.
Confirmed: cumulative before was 340,833.30 < 340,961.75. R000312 adds 256.90 making 341,090.20 > budget. special_approval=0.

supporting_evidence: All 6 key records verified via expense_query_get_expense_detail: all have status=approved, special_approval=0
Cumulative calculations verified by data analyst subagent with per-department full record sets
exceptions_or_boundaries: Special approval exemption (08_budget_management.md Article 4, 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Article 13): all 6 key records lack special_approval
Budget boundary confirmed for each department: cumulative before key record was always < budget, cumulative after was always > budget
rationale: All 6 findings are confirmed. Each department exceeded its annual budget at the identified key record, and none of those records had special approval. No false positives detected.
